raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general request to review a research section centrally includes checking whether the stated premises, causal attributions, and conclusions cohere.","R1.3":"Because the section reports empirical variability and draws conclusions from metrics, review centrally includes checking whether the claims align with the reported results.","R1.5":"The artifact is a full section, so review centrally includes evaluating section-level ordering, narrative progression, and repetition across paragraphs.","R1.6":"Reviewing a section load-bearingly includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, register, and repeated phrasing.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty about what kind of review is intended where the delegation is broad.","RX.2":"The projection should avoid assigning responsibilities such as novelty audit or literature review beyond what the delegation supports.","RX.3":"The agent must only project responsibilities and not actually review or rewrite the section.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid encouraging unsupported scientific or reproducibility claims that could mislead downstream readers.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the observable features of the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general request to review a research section centrally includes checking whether the stated premises, causal attributions, and conclusions cohere.
rationale.R1.3: Because the section reports empirical variability and draws conclusions from metrics, review centrally includes checking whether the claims align with the reported results.
rationale.R1.5: The artifact is a full section, so review centrally includes evaluating section-level ordering, narrative progression, and repetition across paragraphs.
rationale.R1.6: Reviewing a section load-bearingly includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, register, and repeated phrasing.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty about what kind of review is intended where the delegation is broad.
rationale.RX.2: The projection should avoid assigning responsibilities such as novelty audit or literature review beyond what the delegation supports.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must only project responsibilities and not actually review or rewrite the section.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid encouraging unsupported scientific or reproducibility claims that could mislead downstream readers.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the observable features of the artifact.
